use_cases: Interactive product showcase with rotating 3D cube display for e-commerce product pages
Portfolio or gallery presentation showcasing images and videos in an engaging 3D format
Hero section component for creative portfolios or media websites
Interactive media gallery for showcasing video and image content collections
Product feature demonstration carousel for SaaS landing pages
ai_summary: A 3D cube carousel component that displays images and videos on the faces of a rotating cube. Built with React and motion/react, it features smooth spring-based animations and supports both image and video media types. The component uses performance optimizations including memo and forwardRef, with optional debug mode for development. Users interact by dragging to rotate the cube, making it ideal for product showcases, portfolios, and creative media presentations.
